title: COVID-19: Mobilizing industry to provide medical supplies - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19: Mobilizing industry to provide medical supplies
Health Canada and other government departments are collaborating with the health product industry to provide medical supplies in response to COVID-19. Initiatives undertaken by Canada will:
- help identify and fill product gaps
- find innovative solutions to our health care needs
- provide funding to Canadian businesses to scale up production or re-tool their manufacturing lines
- Supply and procurement
- Manufacturing scale-up and re-tooling
- Research and funding opportunities

## Supply and procurement
Canada needs products and services to meet the unprecedented demand due to the COVID-19 pandemic. These include medical products to prevent infection, such as N95 masks, vinyl gloves and hand sanitizers.
The full list of products and services needed is on Buyandsell.gc.ca . You can also find information on product specifications .
Suppliers authorized to sell in Canada and able to provide products or services that are needed must complete a submission form .

## Manufacturing scale-up and re-tooling
Innovation Canada has issued a call to action to Canadian manufacturers that:
- can make needed supplies that meet product specifications
- have the potential to re-tool existing facilities or equipment quickly or
- have skilled workers who can be available to work anywhere in Canada
Manufacturers must complete an intake form .

## Research and funding opportunities
Canadian and international organizations are offering grant programs and funding opportunities to find innovative solutions to help address the COVID-19 crisis. For example:
- National Research Council of Canada: COVID-19 Programs and Support
- Canadian Institute of Health Research: COVID-19 Rapid Research Funding Opportunity [closed]
- Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council of Canada: Alliance COVID-19 grants [closed]
- Innovative Solutions Canada: COVID-19 Funding Opportunities
- Strategic Innovation Fund: Funding to Advance Canada's Countermeasures in the Fight Against COVID-19
- Importing and exporting medical devices
- Health Canada's regulatory response to COVID-19: International engagement
- Prime Minister announces funding to advance the development of Canadian COVID-19 vaccine technologies
- Prime Minister announces Canada's Plan to Mobilize Industry to fight COVID-19
- Information for health product manufacturers and distributors in relation to COVID-19
- Prime Minister announces new support for COVID-19 medical research and vaccine development
- Government of Canada and provincial partners invest more than $109M in COVID-19 research
